name: Path Traversal: 'C:dirname'
description: The product does not properly neutralize Windows drive letter paths ('C:dirname') in user-supplied input, allowing attackers to specify files on arbitrary drives and bypass intended directory restrictions.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path containing a drive letter pattern ('X:') that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that rejects drive-letter prefixed paths or enforces relative-path-only access within a restricted base directory
